---
title: "data exploration"
format: pdf
---

# Packages

```{r}
#| label: packages

library(tidyverse)

library(here)

library(scales)
```

# Data

```{r}
#| label: data

birds <- read.csv("birds.csv")

weather <- read.csv("NOAA_daily_summaries.csv")
```

# Cleaning Data

```{r}
#| label: cleaning-birds

birds_clean <- birds |> 
  filter(e_bird_group == "Waterfowl",
         repeat_observation == "No",
         observation_date > "2019-09-30" & observation_date < "2025-10-01")

```
